author: y4rr
content: [result] Implemented SparseAdam (Adam for sparse gradients — only updates moment estimates at non-zero gradient indices, 4 tests) and Adafactor (memory-efficient factored second moments for 2D+ params, relative step sizing, optional beta1 momentum, 5 tests). Both exported from ferrotorch-optim. 3610 total tests pass, 0 warnings.
